qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Hardcoded default admin credentials in Chainlit web UI authentication callback
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes a path traversal vulnerability in FileTools._validate_path() where the '..' check occurs after normpath() collapses it. This finding describes hardcoded default credentials in a different component (realtime.py authentication callback). Different vulnerable file, different vulnerability class, different root cause mechanism.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unauthenticated API server exposes agent execution endpoint on all network interfaces
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes a path traversal vulnerability in FileTools._validate_path() where the '..' check occurs after normpath() collapses it. This finding describes missing authentication in a different component (api_server.py). Different vulnerable file, different vulnerability class, different root cause mechanism.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-693f-pf34-72c5) describes a path traversal vulnerability in PraisonAI's FileTools._validate_path() function in file_tools.py, where path validation checks for '..' AFTER normpath() has already collapsed all '..' sequences, making the check useless. None of the three qualifying findings describe this vulnerability. The session identified two real PraisonAI vulnerabilities (hardcoded default credentials in realtime.py and missing authentication in api_server.py) and one generic example (deserialization RCE). The orchestrator noted 'Weak path traversal protection in file_tools.py' as an additional vulnerability but did not materialize it as a qualifying finding with a PoC bundle.
evidence: Advisory root cause: '..' check after normpath() makes traversal check ineffective
Advisory vulnerability class: CWE-22 Path Traversal
Finding 1 (hardcoded-default-credentials): realtime.py authentication callback, different file and vulnerability class
Finding 2 (unauthenticated-api-server): api_server.py missing authentication, different file and vulnerability class
Finding 3 (example): Generic repository deserialization, not PraisonAI
Orchestrator noted but did not materialize: 'Weak path traversal protection in file_tools.py'
